title: Message in a Bottle
why_this_song: Message in a Bottle by The Police (1979) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 25 times; first heard in: "Sending out an S.O.S"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "I hope that someone gets my"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Message in a bottle, yeah"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Message in a bottle, yeah"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "I hope that someone gets my"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "sending" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "sending" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hope" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "hope" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: More loneliness than any man could bear
Oh, message in a bottle, yeah

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Rescue me before I fall into despair, oh
I hope that someone gets my

exercises.prompt_en: "Message in a Bottle" was released in 1979. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Message in a Bottle" foi lançada em 1979. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Message in a Bottle" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Message in a Bottle" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
